---
name: Feature Request (功能建议)
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / 问题描述
<!-- What problem would this solve? / 这个功能要解决什么问题？ -->


## Proposal / 方案建议
<!-- Describe your proposed solution / 描述你建议的解决方案 -->


## Alternatives / 备选方案
<!-- Any alternative approaches considered / 考虑过的其他方案 -->


## Scope / 影响范围
<!-- Which component(s) would be affected? / 会影响哪些模块？
  - [ ] Game detection / 游戏检测
  - [ ] Replay parsing / 录像解析
  - [ ] Holographic map (three.js) / 全息地图
  - [ ] In-game overlay / 游戏内覆盖层
  - [ ] Model conversion / 模型转换
  - [ ] Documentation / 文档
-->

## Additional Context / 补充信息
